name: sonite
description: A TypeScript-like language that compiles to native code via LLVM
author: Ethan Davies

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @sonite/compiler build && pnpm --filter @sonite/llvm build && pnpm --filter @sonite/runtime build && pnpm --filter @sonite/std build && tsx packages/cli/src/cli.ts
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @sonite/compiler test && pnpm --filter @sonite/llvm test && pnpm --filter @sonite/runtime test && pnpm --filter @sonite/cli test && pnpm --filter @sonite/lsp test && pnpm --filter sonite-vscode test
